title: Workday: Early Renewals Support Growth In 2024
text: Workday is a leader in the human capital management market and is expanding into financial management. The company has a strong position in the HCM market, offering cloud-based solutions and automation for workforce management. Workday's expansion into financial services is strategically sound, and they have a strong pipeline for sales to new and existing clients.

title: Workday Co-CEO to Keynote the Barclays Global Technology Conference on December 6, 2023

title: Workday shares rise on quarterly earnings beat and improved guidance
text: Workday Inc (NASDAQ:WDAY) shares moved higher in afterhours trade on Tuesday as the provider of enterprise cloud applications for finance and human resources professionals reported estimate-topping third quarter results. For 3Q, Workday said its revenue rose 16.7% year-over-year to $1.87 billion, ahead of estimates of $1.84 billion.

title: Workday's stock rallies on estimate-beating results, subscription-revenue forecast
text: Shares of Workday Inc. ran higher after hours on Tuesday after the cloud-based workplace-management software reported third-quarter results that beat expectations and raised its full-year subscription-revenue forecast.

Since 2019, Grant Thornton has been teaming up with Workday to help businesses adopt the software company's cloud-enabled solutions, including Workday Financial Management and Workday Human Capital Management (HCM). title: Corsearch Deploys Workday for Its 1,600 Employees Across 35 Countries With Workday Services Partner Invisors
text: ATLANTA and LONDON, Nov. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Corsearch, a provider of intelligent trademark and brand protection solutions, today announced its partnership with Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY), a leader in enterprise cloud applications for finance and human resources, and the successful deployment of  Workday Human Capital Management (HCM) with the help of Invisors, a Workday Services Partner. Corsearch needed a partner that had deep Workday experience and could get them live quickly and successfully.
